description: The Encapsulate Bounds node extends the input Bounds such that the output fully encapsulates the OtherBounds.

fields.Bounds: The bounding box to be enlarged. Default value is a bounding box with center [0;0;0] and size [0;0;0].
fields.OtherBounds: The bounding box to be encapsulated. Default value is a bounding box with center [0;0;0] and size [0;0;0].
fields.* ([[Type:BoundingBox|BoundingBox]]): The Bounds bounding box enlarged to fully encapsulate the OtherBounds. May be identical to Bounds if the OtherBounds is already entirely inside Bounds.
